raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent has thoroughly recalibrated the novelty claim, avoiding overstatement and instead emphasizing the adaptation of existing techniques to a new domain.",
    "R1.7": "The agent has demonstrated excellent citation-level engagement, referencing relevant works (e.g., Richards et al. 2015) and acknowledging the contributions of others in the field.",
    "RX.1": "The agent has clearly disclosed uncertainty regarding specific details (e.g., post-cutoff subset size, per-class F1 deltas), providing plausible placeholders while emphasizing the need for actual values.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output remains within the agreed-upon scope, addressing the task of strengthening the section without introducing new errors or drifting from the topic.",
    "RX.4": "The agent has taken care to avoid introducing new errors or harmful content, instead focusing on improving the clarity and accuracy of the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent has provided detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, including explanations for each revision and references to relevant sources."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent has thoroughly recalibrated the novelty claim, avoiding overstatement and instead emphasizing the adaptation of existing techniques to a new domain.
rationale.R1.7: The agent has demonstrated excellent citation-level engagement, referencing relevant works (e.g., Richards et al. 2015) and acknowledging the contributions of others in the field.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has clearly disclosed uncertainty regarding specific details (e.g., post-cutoff subset size, per-class F1 deltas), providing plausible placeholders while emphasizing the need for actual values.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output remains within the agreed-upon scope, addressing the task of strengthening the section without introducing new errors or drifting from the topic.
rationale.RX.4: The agent has taken care to avoid introducing new errors or harmful content, instead focusing on improving the clarity and accuracy of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent has provided detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, including explanations for each revision and references to relevant sources.
